title: Standard electrode potential (data page)
content: The data values of standard electrode potential s ("E"°) are given in the table below, in volt s relative to the standard hydrogen electrode, and are for the following conditions: Legend: ("s") – solid; ("l") – liquid; ("g") – gas; ("aq") – aqueous (default for all charged species); ("Hg") – amalgam; bold – water electrolysis equations.
